/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libsd_map_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libsd_map_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/sd_map_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/sd_map_msgs/msg/sn_lane_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sd_map_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/sd_map_msgs/msg/sn_map_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sd_map_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/sd_map_msgs/msg/sn_state__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
